typeProperties.script:
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/IWP/sitepro_iwp.csv']) ~> srcStageToRawIWP
srcStageToRawIWP sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	filePattern:(concat(substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/','iwp_sitepro_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')),
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> destStageToRawIWP
